overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains an active presence across Mastodon, LinkedIn, and Bluesky, focusing on research related to social media, disinformation, and computational social science. Total follower count is 3580. Engagement varies by platform, with LinkedIn generating the highest individual post engagement.

contentThemes.description: Sharing updates on research papers, grants, and project releases.
Discussions and insights related to computational methods for analyzing social media.
Posts related to job openings and research opportunities for students and researchers.
Content focused on the study and detection of disinformation and coordinated inauthentic behavior.

recommendations: Cross-promote content across platforms to maximize reach.
Engage more actively with followers by responding to comments and questions.
Use platform-specific hashtags to increase visibility.
Experiment with different content formats (e.g., images, videos) to boost engagement.

platformInsights.bluesky: Bluesky is used for announcing publications and conference presentations, with a moderate level of engagement. Opportunity to further cultivate a community and engage in discussions.
platformInsights.mastodon: Mastodon is used for sharing updates on tool releases and engaging in discussions about methodological approaches. Engagement is lower compared to other platforms, suggesting a smaller active community.
platformInsights.linkedin: LinkedIn drives the highest engagement, particularly with posts announcing research grants and job openings. Content related to professional opportunities and career development performs well.

topPerformingContent.content: Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.

Now hiring: Two postdoctoral researchers to join our team working on computational methods for social media analysis. Background in data science, computational social science, or related fields preferred.
Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
